element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Collecting 5 Flickies per section to progress; color-coded behaviors (blue/pink/orange seek Sonic; green/red wander)
Primary obstacle type blocking Flicky progress
No Flicky collection; pure combat against pattern-based boss

element_introduction_order.element: Special stage access (hidden Tails/Knuckles, 50+ rings requirement)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Behind-Sonic camera perspective; ring collection under pressure; Chaos Emerald gates true ending
Required for final boss and true ending unlock

typical_tension_triggers: Flicky scattering on hit (loss of progress, ring loss)
Green/red Flickies wandering away (unpredictable collection delay)
Low ring count with obstacles ahead
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Iterative grinding rhythm: collect 5 Flickies per section, repeat across acts; boss acts spike tension; special stages introduce time-pressure collecting under camera shift

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden Tails/Knuckles placement for special stage access signals optional high-skill content
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Isometric perspective obscures vertical/horizontal depth; requires player spatial reinterpretation vs. traditional 2D Sonic side-scrollers

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction: basic Flicky collection in open sections, few robot obstacles, abundant rings
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Complexity increase: more aggressive robot placement, wandering Flicky types (green/red) complicate collection rhythm, optional special stages introduce dual-skill testing
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss-heavy tension: Robotnik pattern mastery required; final fight gated by all 7 Chaos Emeralds (special stage completion prerequisite)
notable_spikes: First zone boss (Act 3) — combat-focused deviation from collection rhythm
Special stage segments — camera perspective shift + ring-threshold checkpoints create pressure different from main gameplay
Final boss — requires all Emeralds, testing accumulated zone mastery

notable_level_patterns.description: Each zone contains 2 standard Flicky-collection acts and 1 boss-only act, segmenting gameplay into rhythmic blocks of resource gathering then boss confrontation
Acts subdivided into sections; each section contains exactly 5 Flickies to collect; completion gates progression to next section or act, creating granular checkpoint rewards
Hidden character (Tails/Knuckles) placement in main levels requires ring threshold (50+) to unlock optional behind-Sonic running stage; creates asymmetric skill requirement vs. standard platforming
Act 3 removes Flicky collection entirely; focuses purely on pattern-reading and dodge timing against Robotnik's attack sequences
